issue_title: [Bug]: FIx updateClampedRasterForLayer is not a function
issue_body_preview:
With the Globe enabled and set to use the LithoSphere renderer, clicking on a vector with 3D Layer Type = clamped results in:

```
Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: this.renderer._.tiledWorld.updateClampedRasterForLayer is not a function
    at GlobeRenderer._clearHighlightLithoSphere (GlobeRenderer.
test_description_zh: 在启用 Globe 且渲染器设置为 LithoSphere 的情况下，找到一个 3D Layer Type 设置为 clamped 的矢量图层，点击该图层上的矢量要素，观察点击后的高亮交互和控制台是否正常。
expected_result_zh: 点击 clamped 类型的矢量要素后，要素能够正常高亮显示，交互流程顺畅，控制台不出现 'updateClampedRasterForLayer is not a function' 的 TypeError 错误。
